steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content: The equation is $\dfrac{-54}{w}=6$, and $w$ cannot be $0$. Multiply both sides by $w$ to remove the denominator: $$-54=6w.$$

steps.title: Check the solution
steps.content: Substitute $w=-9$ into the original equation: $$\dfrac{-54}{-9}=6.$$ The equation is true, so the solution is -9.
